header.title: Getting Started with Document Administration
header.description: Configure and manage your documentation administration workspace.

sections.title: What is Document Administration?
sections.content: Manage, organize, and maintain all technical and operational documentation for your project.

sections.title: Documentation Health Monitoring
sections.content: Track gaps, validate coverage, verify routes, and ensure documentation quality standards.

sections.title: Quality Engineering
sections.content: Apply standards, validate patterns, and improve documentation quality across your knowledge base.
